your_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
note: Both features touch save() in Image.py + test_image.py, so file-level disjoint split isn't possible. Propose time-slicing instead: I'll add my 'backup'/'backup_suffix' params first as a small self-contained block right at the top of save() (before the existing body) and a couple of new test methods appended at the end of the relevant test class, then send DONE. Please wait for my DONE before editing, then add your 'dry_run' param as its own separate block/early-return in save() and your own new test methods appended after mine, to minimize line-overlap/conflicts. OK?

type: ACCEPT

your_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
note: Our features both touch save() so full file disjointness isn't possible. In test_image.py I'll add new standalone test functions (e.g. test_dry_run) and won't touch your backup tests. Proceeding to implement now.

note: Backup feature implemented and tested (196 passed, 1 skipped). Changes: added 'shutil' import; added backup/backup_suffix docstring + params.pop() calls right after 'save_all = params.pop(...)'; added backup-copy block inside 'if open_fp:' right after 'created = not os.path.exists(filename)' (before the append/open branch). New tests: test_save_backup, test_save_backup_suffix, test_save_backup_no_existing_file, test_save_backup_default_false, inserted right after test_readonly_save. You're clear to edit now.
